This page was generated using data obtained on 2023-10-29. Please, send me a message if you want it updated!




Proposed edits at this page are so obvious that automatic edit makes sense.
  • wikipedia tag unexpected language
  • wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect
  • wikipedia from wikidata tag
  • wikipedia from wikidata tag, unexpected language
  • wikidata from wikipedia tag
  • wikipedia tag in an outdated form for removal

wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect
wikidata and wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed
Q106104494 vs (missing) article redirects from de:SMP-Terminal Būtingė to de:SPM Būtingė
Būtingės naftos terminalas - an affected OSM element that may be improved
de:SMP-Terminal Būtingė -> de:SPM Būtingė
SPM Būtingė

wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikidata redirect
wikidata and wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because wikidata tag points to a redirect that should be followed

wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for subject prefixed tags
subject:wikidata and subject:wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because subject:wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed
Q61386819 vs (missing) article redirects from lt:Skapiškio Šv. Lauryno kankinio bažnyčia to lt:Skapiškio šv. Lauryno Kankinio bažnyčia
Skapiškio Šv. Lauryno kankinio bažnyčia - an affected OSM element that may be improved

Q473670 vs (missing) article redirects from lt:1863 m. sukilimas to lt:1863–1864 m. sukilimas
1863 m. sukilimas - an affected OSM element that may be improved
